CustomField.formula: IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(Insurance_Mandate__c,'Blocker to Payment'),ISPICKVAL(Insurance_Mandate__c,'Blocker to Placement')),15/100,0)+ IF(Perfect_Paragraph_Implemented__c,15/100,0)+ IF(Renewal_paragraph_implemented__c,10/100,0)+ IF( IR35_ParagraphIR35_Secure__c ,10/100,0)+ IF(IR35_Protect_Blocker__c,15/100,0)+ IF(Referring__c,5/100,0)+ IF(IR35_Tool_Sign_Up__c,20/100,0)
CustomField.label: Partner Penetration
